questions.question: Describe the main difference between the k-means clustering algorithm and the k-medoids clustering algorithm. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Explain the centering process in k-means

questions.question: What is the primary advantage of using the grid-based approach for density-based clustering? Provide a real-world example of its application.
questions.hint: Consider the clustering of customer data

questions.question: A dataset contains 2 distinct clusters, one with a high density of points and the other with a low density of points. Which density-based clustering algorithm would be most suitable for this dataset? Explain your answer.
